lines.gurmukhi: ਵਥੁ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸਾਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਉ ਜਪੰਦੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vath suhaavee saae naanak naau japando tis dhanee |2|
lines.english: The only thing which is pleasing, O Nanak, is that which inspires one to meditate on the Name of the Master. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਮਨੀ ਚਮਤਕਾਰ ਤਿਉ ਵਰਤਾਰਾ ਜਗ ਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: daamanee chamatakaar tiau varataaraa jag khe |
lines.english: Like the flash of lightning, worldly affairs last only for a moment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਸੋਧਿ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasatr sodh sabh kinai keem na jaanee |
lines.english: People have searched all the Simritees and Shaastras, but no one knows the Lord's value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan bhettai saadhasang so har rang maanee |
lines.english: That being, who joins the Saadh Sangat enjoys the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਏਹ ਰਤਨਾ ਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam karataa purakh eeh ratanaa khaanee |
lines.english: True is the Naam, the Name of the Creator, the Primal Being. It is the mine of precious jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: masatak hovai likhiaa har simar paraanee |
lines.english: That mortal, who has such pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon his forehead, meditates in remembrance on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਨੈਣੀ ਸੁਖੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਭੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: antar chintaa nainee sukhee mool na utarai bhukh |
lines.english: He harbors anxiety within himself, but to the eyes, he appears to be happy; his hunger never departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਸਾ ਦਿਚੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਹਮਾਣੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tosaa dichai sach naam naanak mihamaanee |4|
lines.english: O Lord, please bless Nanak, Your humble guest, with the supplies of the True Name. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਲਥੋ ਦੁਖੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam bin kisai na latho dukh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, no one's sorrows have ever departed. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਠੜੇ ਸੇਈ ਸਾਥ ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਲਦਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: muttharre seee saath jinee sach na ladiaa |
lines.english: Those caravans which did not load the Truth have been plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਇਕੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak se saabaas jinee gur mil ik pachhaaniaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who meet the True Guru, and acknowledge the One Lord, are congratulated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਬੈਸਨਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਸੋ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jithai baisan saadh jan so thaan suhandaa |
lines.english: Beautiful is that place, where the Holy people dwell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਸਭੁ ਮੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: oe sevan samrith aapanaa binasai sabh mandaa |
lines.english: They serve their All-powerful Lord, and they give up all their evil ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੰਤ ਬੇਦੁ ਕਹੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran paarabraham sant bed kahandaa |
lines.english: The Saints and the Vedas proclaim, that the Supreme Lord God is the Saving Grace of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਭਾਵੰਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jaachai ek naam man tan bhaavandaa |5|
lines.english: Nanak asks for the One Name, which is pleasing to his mind and body. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਹੈ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਵਰਤੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal teraa birad hai jug jug varatandaa |
lines.english: You are the Lover of Your devotees - this is Your natural way, in each and every age.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੜੀ ਚੁਹਕੀ ਪਹੁ ਫੁਟੀ ਵਗਨਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਤਰੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: chirree chuhakee pahu futtee vagan bahut tarang |
lines.english: The sparrows are chirping, and dawn has come; the wind stirs up the waves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜ ਰੂਪ ਸੰਤਨ ਰਚੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਹਿ ਰੰਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: acharaj roop santan rache naanak naameh rang |1|
lines.english: Such a wondrous thing the Saints have fashioned, O Nanak, in the Love of the Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਤਹੀ ਜਹ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar mandar khuseea tahee jeh too aaveh chit |
lines.english: Homes, palaces and pleasures are there, where You, O Lord, come to mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕੀਆ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭਿ ਕੁਮਿਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: duneea keea vaddiaaeea naanak sabh kumit |2|
lines.english: All worldly grandeur, O Nanak, is like false and evil friends. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸਚੀ ਰਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan sachee raas hai kinai viralai jaataa |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord is the true capital; how rare are those who understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਭਾਇਰਹੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਇ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tisai paraapat bhaaeirahu jis dee bidhaataa |
lines.english: He alone receives it, O Siblings of Destiny, unto whom the Architect of Destiny gives it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ਸਭਿ ਦੋਖਹ ਖਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang gun gaaeaa sabh dokhah khaataa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and all of his sufferings are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਜਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan bheetar mauliaa har rang jan raataa |
lines.english: His servant is imbued with the Love of the Lord; his body and mind blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਈ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਇਕੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak soee jeeviaa jin ik pachhaataa |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone lives, who acknowledges the One Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਖੜੀਆ ਸੁਹਾਵੀਆ ਲਗੜੀਆ ਅਕ ਕੰਠਿ ॥
lines.translit: khakharreea suhaaveea lagarreea ak kantth |
lines.english: The fruit of the swallow-wort plant looks beautiful, attached to the branch of the tree;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਾਰੇਦੇ ਮਰਿ ਗਏ ਮਰਿ ਭਿ ਨ ਸਕਹਿ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: visaarede mar ge mar bhi na sakeh mool |
lines.english: Those who forget the Lord die, but they cannot die a complete death.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਹ ਵਿਛੋੜਾ ਧਣੀ ਸਿਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਸੈ ਗੰਠਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: birah vichhorraa dhanee siau naanak sahasai gantth |1|
lines.english: but when it is separated from the stem of its Master, O Nanak, it breaks apart into thousands of fragments. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਮੁਖ ਹੋਏ ਰਾਮ ਤੇ ਜਿਉ ਤਸਕਰ ਉਪਰਿ ਸੂਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vemukh hoe raam te jiau tasakar upar sool |2|
lines.english: Those who turn their backs on the Lord suffer, like the thief impaled on the gallows. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਸੁਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sukh nidhaan prabh ek hai abinaasee suniaa |
lines.english: The One God is the treasure of peace; I have heard that He is eternal and imperishable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal pooriaa ghatt ghatt har bhaniaa |
lines.english: He is totally pervading the water, the land and the sky; the Lord is said to be permeating each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਨੀਚ ਸਭ ਇਕ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਕੀਟ ਹਸਤੀ ਬਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aooch neech sabh ik samaan keett hasatee baniaa |
lines.english: He looks alike upon the high and the low, the ant and the elephant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਤ ਸਖਾ ਸੁਤ ਬੰਧਿਪੋ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਸ ਦੇ ਜਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: meet sakhaa sut bandhipo sabh tis de janiaa |
lines.english: Friends, companions, children and relatives are all created by Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਸਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tus naanak devai jis naam tin har rang maniaa |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who is blessed with the Naam, enjoys the Lord's love and affection. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾਂ ਮਨਿ ਮੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa saas giraas na visarai har naamaan man mant |
lines.english: Those who do not forget the Lord, with each breath and morsel of food, whose minds are filled with the Mantra of the Lord's Name

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸਿ ਸੇਈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਸੋਈ ਸੰਤੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan si seee naanakaa pooran soee sant |1|
lines.english: - they alone are blessed; O Nanak, they are the perfect Saints. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਜਕਿ ਪਉਦਾ ਕਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਜਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਰਸੂਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dojak paudaa kiau rahai jaa chit na hoe rasool |2|
lines.english: How can he escape from falling into hell, when he does not remember the Prophet? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠੇ ਪਹਰ ਭਉਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਖਾਵਣ ਸੰਦੜੈ ਸੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: atthe pehar bhaudaa firai khaavan sandarrai sool |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, he wanders around, driven by his hunger for food.
